AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Actual Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The actual amount
AD_FIELD.HELP: Actual amount indicates the agreed upon amount for a document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Search Key
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A fast method for finding a particular record.
AD_FIELD.HELP:
A search key allows for a fast method of finding a particular record. If you leave the search key empty, the system automatically creates a numeric number originating from a document sequence defined in the "Document Sequence" window. The sequence naming convention follows a rule "DocumentNo_TableName", where TableName is the actual name of the database table (e.g. C_Order).
Usually, company's internal identifiers for various records (products, customers, etc) are stored here.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Is Cost Calculated
AD_FIELD.HELP: Determines that the cost amount has been calculated

AD_FIELD.NAME: Invoice Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The time listed on the invoice.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Date Invoice indicates the date printed on the invoice.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Name
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A non-unique identifier for a record/document often used as a search tool.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A more descriptive identifier (that does need to be unique) of a record/document that is used as a default search option along with the search key (that is unique and mostly shorter). It is up to 60 characters in length.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Description
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A description is limited to 255 characters.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Due Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date when a specified request must be carried out by.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Date when the payment is due without deductions or discount

AD_FIELD.NAME: Sales Order Line
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A unique and often automatically generated identifier for a sales order line.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A unique identifier and a reference to a sales order line (product).

AD_FIELD.NAME: Commission Run
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Commission Run or Process
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Commission Run is a unique system defined identifier of a specific run of commission. When a Commission is processed on the Commission Screen, the Commission Run ID will display.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Basis Status
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The documents that will take into account to calculate the commission: all documents or fully paid documents)
AD_FIELD.HELP: The documents that will take into account to calculate the commission: all documents or fully paid documents)

AD_FIELD.NAME: Invoice Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The time listed on the invoice.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Date Invoice indicates the date printed on the invoice.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Actual Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The actual amount
AD_FIELD.HELP: Actual amount indicates the agreed upon amount for a document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Comments
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A space to write additional related information.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Information displays data from the source document line.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Reference
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The data type of this field.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Reference displays the source document number.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Currency
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: An accepted medium of monetary exchange that may vary across countries.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Indicates the currency to be used when processing this document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Commission Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Generated Commission Amount
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Commission Amount indicates the resulting amount from a Commission Run.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Organization
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Organizational entity within client
AD_FIELD.HELP: An organization is a unit of your client or legal entity - examples are store, department. You can share data between organizations.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Client
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Client for this installation.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Client is a company or a legal entity. You cannot share data between Clients.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Converted Amount
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The monetary sum at which one unit of measure is changed to another.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Converted Amount is the result of multiplying the Source Amount by the Conversion Rate for this target currency.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Business Partner
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Anyone who takes part in daily business operations by acting as a customer, employee, etc.
AD_FIELD.HELP: A Business Partner is anyone with whom you transact. This can include a customer, vendor, employee or any combination of these.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Invoice Line
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A statement displaying one item or charge in an invoice.
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Invoice Line uniquely identifies a single line of an Invoice.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Actual Quantity
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The actual quantity
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Actual Quantity indicates the quantity as referenced on a document.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Commission Run
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Commission Run or Process
AD_FIELD.HELP: The Commission Run is a unique system defined identifier of a specific run of commission. When a Commission is processed on the Commission Screen, the Commission Run ID will display.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Active
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: A flag indicating whether this record is available for use or de-activated.
AD_FIELD.HELP: There are two methods of making records unavailable in the system: One is to delete the record, the other is to de-activate the record. A de-activated record is not available for selection, but available for reporting. There are two reasons for de-activating and not deleting records: (1) The system requires the record for auditing purposes. (2) The record is referenced by other records. E.g., you cannot delete a Business Partner, if there are existing invoices for it. By de-activating the Business Partner you prevent it from being used in future transactions.

AD_FIELD.NAME: Due Date
AD_FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The date when a specified request must be carried out by.
AD_FIELD.HELP: Date when the payment is due without deductions or discount
